title: Chapter 70
content:
Chapter 70: Chapter 70: The Anatomy Lesson

The room was quiet, save for the frantic beating of Yun Xi’s heart. She leaned her face into Kai’s palm, her eyes closed, basking in the warmth of his acceptance. She felt safe. She felt understood.

But while Yun Xi saw a friend, Kai saw a notification.

[Ding!]

A translucent blue screen flickered into existence right in front of Kai’s eyes, hovering over Yun Xi’s trembling form.

[System Analysis: Target Detected]

[Target: Yun Xi (The Shy Scholar)]

[Status: Emotionally Vulnerable / Highly Aroused / Curious]

[New Quest: The Anatomy Lesson]

[Objective: Satisfy her curiosity. Conquer the Scholar.]

[Reward: +200 XP]

Kai blinked, the blue light reflecting in his dark pupils.

200 XP?

Kai thought, his expression shifting from gentle to calculative.

For Yun Xi? That’s easy xp. She likes me. She just confessed her deepest, dirtiest secret to me. She’s practically begging for it.

He looked down at the top of her head. He could smell the vanilla scent of her hair. He knew he couldn’t just say, "Yun Xi, let me fuck you." She was too shy, too fragile. He had to play the long game. He had to use her own weapon against her: curiosity.

Go slow,

Kai told himself.

Make her think it’s learning.

Slowly, deliberately, Kai slid his hand from her shoulder down her arm. His fingers traced the curve of her elbow, then moved inward.

He wrapped his arm around her thick, soft waist.

"Yun Xi," he murmured.

He pulled.

"Ah!"

Yun Xi gasped as she was hauled forward. Her center of gravity shifted, and she collided with him.

Squish.

It was a collision of softness against hardness. Her massive, uncontained breasts smashed against his broad chest. The loose beige tunic did nothing to dampen the sensation. Kai felt the heavy mounds flatten, molding to his ribs, radiating an intense, womanly heat.

Kai didn’t pull back. He tightened his grip, anchoring her against him. He rested his chin gently on the top of her head, surrounding her with his scent and presence.

"Yun Xi," Kai whispered into her hair, a curvy, predatory smile playing on his lips that she couldn’t see. "You don’t have to feel sad, right? I am always here for you."

Yun Xi’s breath hitched in her throat. Her hands hovered in the air, unsure where to put them, before settling tentatively on his waist. The feeling of his hard muscles under his uniform made her knees weak.

"K... Kai..." she stammered, her voice muffled against his chest. "We... we are too close..."

Kai squeezed her waist, his fingers digging slightly into the soft roll of flesh above her hips.

"Don’t you like it, Yun Xi?" he asked, his voice low and vibrating through his chest directly into her breasts.

Yun Xi gulped. Like it? She felt like she was melting. Every nerve ending in her body was screaming for more.

"I..." She bit her lip. "Kai... Mom can come anytime... we... we should study..."

"That’s what we are doing, Yun Xi," Kai purred, moving his hand up her back in slow, soothing circles. "We are studying."

He pulled back just enough to look down at her, but kept his hips pressed against hers.

"You are very curious," Kai said, his eyes dark and intense. "You admitted it. You’ve been drawing them... but you’ve never seen a real cock, right? A real cock of a man?"

Yun Xi’s eyes went wide behind her glasses. The word ’cock’ spoken so casually by him sent a jolt of electricity straight to her dampening panties.

"Kai... what?" she squeaked. "Umm... ahh... yes. I never saw one. But... but why are you saying that?"

She looked around nervously at the door, terrified and thrilled.

"Yun Xi," Kai said, his voice taking on a tone of serious, academic concern. "As a friend, it’s my duty that my friend knows everything. Knowledge is power, right?"

He leaned in closer, his lips brushing her ear.

"And it’s such a shame that you’ve never seen that. All that curiosity, all those drawings... and no reference."

He paused, then delivered the lie that would seal the deal.

"Although," Kai whispered, feigning a tone of vulnerability, "you know... I have also never seen a pussy. Or boobs. Not real ones."

He pulled back to look her in the eyes, his face the picture of innocent boyish curiosity.

"I’ve only read about them in books, just like you."

Yun Xi blinked. The shame she felt evaporated instantly.

He’s just like me, she thought.

He’s innocent too.

"Really?" she breathed, searching his face. A deep blush stained her cheeks, but her eyes were shining with a newfound boldness. "Kai... you really want to see it?"

Kai slowly loosened the hug, but he didn’t step away. He kept his hands on her upper arms, his thumbs brushing the fabric near her armpits, just inches from the swell of her breasts.

"Of course, Yun Xi," Kai said, his voice thick with suppressed hunger. "I want to."

He looked deeply into her eyes, locking her gaze.

"And I am sure you also want to."

He glanced down at her chest, then back up to her eyes.

"I guess it will help us better to study, right? Practical application?"
